events.title: RAMSTEIN SUMMER NIGHT WITH “CUBAN AFFAIRS”
events.summary: Every Friday the Ramstein Summer Nights takes place from July to August. Each theme night has the focus on a certain country with traditional music, food and drinks. The band “CUBAN AFFAIRS” entertains the audi- ence with popular rumba, mambo and salsa rhythms including songs by “Buena Vista Social Club”. BREZELFEST...

events.title: ZURLAUBENER MOSEL FESTIVAL
events.summary: The Trier Mosel Festival in the Zurlauben district is also called the Zurlauben Heimatfest and takes place right on the Mosel River. events.title: HAHNENFEST
events.summary: Look forward to sociable hours, great entertain- ment with the Habachtalers and the Arnbachtaler brass band, tasty chicken, other food, and cool drinks. For little guests, there will be a bouncy castle, and on Saturday, there’s also bull riding for anyone who wants to show oﬀ their skills. Come by, celebrate with us...

events.title: SUMMER SWING AT VOLKSPARK
events.summary: On eight Wednesday evenings in July and August, the Summer Swing will take place again, this year at Volkspark Kaiserslautern. You can look forward to a diverse program. Enjoy handmade, high-qual- ity, exciting music from one of the biggest music families in the world: jazz. Further dates: July 22, 29, Aug. 5, 12, 1...

events.title: STADTMAUERFEST FREINSHEIM
events.summary: “With good mood around the wall” – that’s the motto of the City Wall Festival, which is always celebrated on the third weekend of July. The festi- val, known far beyond the town’s borders, presents itself in a fresh, summery way. Celebrations take place on both sides of the almost entirely pre- served medieval city...

events.title: WEINKERWE EINSELTHUM
events.summary: Every year, numerous wine dignitaries, such as the Zellertaler Wine Princess or the Palatinate Wine Queen, travel to the wine fair in Einselthum. events.title: THE FASCINATION OF SPACE
events.summary: On July 18, the museum welcomes NASA astronaut Kathryn Thornton. She will talk about her four mis- sions with the space shuttles discovery, Endeavour and Columbia at the Forum cinema. events.title: GREEK SUMMER NIGHT IN RAMSTEIN
events.summary: Each theme night has the focus on a certain country with traditional music, food and drinks. A “Greek Night” will take place on Friday, July 31. Live music by the band “Mikri Kompania” will entertain the audi- ence. The program will include the performance of a Greek dancing group.
